meaning: n.[气]同温层,最上层,最高阶段
examples: The concept of releasing aerosol sprays into the stratosphere above the Arctic has been proposed by several scientists.
The technology boom sent share prices into the stratosphere.
This was enough to launch their careers into the stratosphere.
These foods are packed with nutrients but can send your grocery bill into the stratosphere.
And there is no way that Mr. Murray will even sniff the Federer-Nadal endorsement stratosphere.
